untranslatable_reason: Signal requires pattern identification (breakout, pullback, consolidation) and bar count tracking within pattern formation—neither 'chart pattern confirmation' nor 'pattern consolidation duration' can be precisely expressed using only the allowed indicators. Pivot levels used as proxy for support/resistance, but true pattern detection logic is not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Hierarchical rule structure cannot be directly encoded in flat condition logic. Used sma_50 for trend confirmation and pivot/support/resistance levels as proxy for key levels. Pattern consolidation condition (bar_count_in_pattern) is not a standard allowed indicator and represents untranslatable requirement. Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT as signal implies both long and short entries depending on trend direction. Original source text about fundamentals is incomplete and does not inform this translation.
